# Resources.UriTemplateVariables method

Returns the variable names referenced by a URI template, in first-seen order. Delegates to [`Variables`](../UriTemplate/Variables.md). (§17.4, R-17.4-n)

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> UriTemplateVariables(string template)
```

| template | The URI template to inspect. |

## Return Value

The distinct variable names.
